title: Set Up Vercel AI SDK in Next.js
summary: Add AI SDK v4 with streaming chat, text generation, and tool calls to a Next.js App Router project.
declaration: I will integrate Vercel AI SDK v4 into this Next.js project with streaming chat support. This sets up the AI SDK, a chat API route, and a streaming chat UI component. I'll use OpenAI as the default provider — say 'use Anthropic' or 'use Google' if you want a different LLM before I start.
